description: When the daemon spawns an agent, configure it to connect to the ao CLI's built-in MCP server (rmcp-based, in orchestrator-cli, stdio transport). The MCP server endpoint and tool scoping should be derived from the agent's profile mcp_server_configs (added in TASK-092 as BTreeMap<String, AgentMcpServerConfig>). Extend agent-runner/src/runner/process.rs to read tool_policy from the agent profile and use AgentToolPolicy::is_tool_permitted() (added in TASK-093) to filter which MCP tools the spawned agent can invoke. The built-in rmcp MCP server is registered in orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_mcp.rs. Note: the old llm-mcp-server crate was removed — all MCP serving is done via rmcp in orchestrator-cli.
title: Wire built-in ao MCP server into agent spawning with per-profile tool scoping
